After an Invader collapses and an ambulance is called, the medics are killed and the sick alien is swiped - but not before a bystander overhears something potentially revealing.
The Invaders implement a plot to raise the radiation on Earth to dangerous levels and then claim to be mankind's saviours by offering an antidote to the effects.
As the summit of world leaders begins, Vincent races to the scene hoping to reveal the truth about the Invaders' nefarious plan.
Vincent investigates a supposed prophet who glows red in a similar fashion to that of dying aliens while evangelising to his flock.
Vincent takes an unconscious Invader to a doctor who produces a revealing X-ray scan of the alien. However, the invaders are determined to obtain the X-ray.
